features.name: ProspectPipeline daemon skeleton: 30min cycle, platform rotation (IG→TT→TW→Threads), state file, NDJSON log
Instagram prospect finder: POST :3005/api/instagram/search/hashtag → extract creator profiles → GET followers → return array
TikTok prospect finder: POST :3006/api/tiktok/search/keyword → extract top video creators → return profile array
Twitter prospect finder: POST :3003/api/twitter/search → extract tweet authors → score ICP → return qualified array
Threads prospect finder: POST :3004/api/threads/search → extract post authors → return array
Unified ICP scorer (10-point): tech/ai/founder/company/revenue signals — shared by all 4 platforms
CRMLite dedup + upsert: check if prospect exists by platform_username, create if new, skip if exists
Per-platform DM queue files: prospect-ig-queue.json, prospect-tt-queue.json, prospect-tw-queue.json, prospect-threads-queue.json
launch-prospect-pipeline.sh: start|stop|status with PID file and nohup logging
Backend routes: GET /api/prospects/status, GET /api/prospects/queue?platform=, POST /api/prospects/queue/approve, POST /api/prospects/queue/skip
Dashboard panel in backend/index.html Queue tab: 4 platform rows with found/qualified/queued counts + review buttons
Strategy config: hashtag/keyword lists per platform loaded from business-goals.json content_niches field
